scripts.dev: concurrently -n infra,init,server,sidecar,web -c blue,cyan,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm dev:infra" "pnpm dev:init" "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:sidecar" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.dev:server: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && bash scripts/wait-for-infra.sh && cd packages/server && cargo run
scripts.dev:status: echo '--- Docker ---' && docker compose ps --format 'table {{.Name}}	{{.Status}}	{{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Docker not running' && echo '' && echo '--- Ports ---' && (lsof -iTCP:5433 -iTCP:4566 -iTCP:8080 -iTCP:3001 -iTCP:5173 -sTCP:LISTEN -P -n 2>/dev/null | awk 'NR>1 {print $1, $9}' || echo 'No services detected')
